strategic_moves: Invested in 49 percent interest in two offshore wind projects under construction in Denmark and Germany for 4,000 million euros
Continued expansion in unlisted renewable energy infrastructure investments
esg_highlights: Voted on a total of 87,399 proposals at 7,936 shareholder meetings in the first half of 2025
Had 1,427 meetings with companies during the period, raising governance and sustainability issues at 55.4 percent of them
Issues mostly concerned capital management, climate change and human capital
key_risks: Expected volatility of 11.4 percent annual fluctuation in fund value
Credit risk from bond holdings with 1.3 percent in lower rating category
Counterparty risk exposure of NOK 270.8 billion
